query:
ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS username VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE AFTER openId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS nameEn VARCHAR(255) AFTER name,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone VARCHAR(32) AFTER email,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS passwordHash VARCHAR(255) AFTER phone,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE AFTER role,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS language ENUM('ar','en') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ar' AFTER isActive;
